mapper.insert: insert into trade_order (trade_no, trade_status, buyer_id, seller_id, item_id, delivery_address_id, quantity, trade_time, payment_time, payment_method, total_amount, shipping_fee, trade_remark, tracking_number, confirm_time, phone, address, user_name, consignee, cancel_reason, rejection_reason, cancel_time) values (#{tradeNo}, #{tradeStatus}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, #{itemId}, #{deliveryAddressId}, #{quantity}, #{tradeTime}, #{paymentTime}, #{paymentMethod}, #{totalAmount}, #{shippingFee}, #{tradeRemark}, #{trackingNumber}, #{confirmTime}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{userName}, #{consignee}, #{cancelReason}, #{rejectionReason}, #{cancelTime})
